member.name: M:BasilEngine.Class1.Add(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds two integers using a native implementation.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Class1.AddNat(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds two integers using a managed stub implementation.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Animation.Play
member.summary: Resumes playing the current animation.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Animation.Pause
member.summary: Pauses the current animation.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Animation.Stop
member.summary: Stops the current animation and resets it to the start.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Animation.Loop
member.summary: Whether the animation should loop.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Animation.PlaybackSpeed
member.summary: Speed multiplier for animation playback.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Animation.IsFinished
member.summary: Whether the current non-looping animation has finished playing.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Animation.Play(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Plays an animation by name.
member.returns: True if the animation was found and started playing.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Animation.HasAnimation(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if an animation clip exists by name.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Audio.Volume
member.summary: Volume multiplier for this audio source.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Audio.Looping
member.summary: Whether the audio should loop when it reaches the end.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Audio.Play
member.summary: Starts playback.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Audio.Pause
member.summary: Pauses playback.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Audio.Stop
member.summary: Stops playback and resets the cursor to the start.

member.name: T:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.CameraType
member.summary: Projection type used by the camera.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.CameraType.ORTHOGRAPHIC
member.summary: Orthographic projection.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.CameraType.PERSPECTIVE
member.summary: Perspective projection.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.active
member.summary: Indicates whether the camera is active (not yet wired).

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.type
member.summary: Projection type of the camera.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.fov
member.summary: Field of view in degrees for perspective cameras.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.AspectRatio
member.summary: Aspect ratio of the camera's projection.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.near
member.summary: Near clipping plane distance.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.far
member.summary: Far clipping plane distance.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.ScreenToWorldPoint(BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a screen point to a world-space position at a given depth.
member.param: Distance from the near plane in world units.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Camera.ScreenPointToRay(BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2)
member.summary: Creates a world-space ray from a screen position.
member.returns: Ray originating from the camera through the screen point.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Component.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a component wrapper and registers the component type with the native engine.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Component.#ctor(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Creates a component wrapper bound to an existing native object.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.Component.typeID
member.summary: Identifies a component type in the native engine.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Component.gameObject
member.summary: The this component is attached to.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Component.transform
member.summary: Cached transform for the owning game object.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Component.tag
member.summary: User-defined tag string.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Component.Enabled
member.summary: Indicates if the component is enabled and should execute in the engine.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Component.GetComponent``1
member.summary: Retrieves a component of the specified type from the same game object.
member.returns: An instance of if found; otherwise null.

member.name: T:BasilEngine.Components.Light.LightType
member.summary: Types of lights supported by the engine.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.type
member.summary: Gets or sets the light type.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.enabled
member.summary: Enables or disables light contribution.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.color
member.summary: Light color as a vector.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.colorR
member.summary: Red component of the light color.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.colorG
member.summary: Green component of the light color.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.colorB
member.summary: Blue component of the light color.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.intensity
member.summary: Brightness multiplier of the light.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.direction
member.summary: Direction of the light (used for directional and spot lights).

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.dirX
member.summary: X component of the light direction.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.dirY
member.summary: Y component of the light direction.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.dirZ
member.summary: Z component of the light direction.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.range
member.summary: Effective range of the light.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.innerConeDeg
member.summary: Inner cone angle in degrees for spot lights.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Light.outerConeDeg
member.summary: Outer cone angle in degrees for spot lights.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Light.SetCones(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets both inner and outer cone angles at once.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.albedoColor
member.summary: Base albedo color of the material (RGB). This modifies the MeshRendererComponent.material struct directly.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.metallic
member.summary: Metallic value (0.0 = dielectric, 1.0 = metallic). This modifies the MeshRendererComponent.material struct directly.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.roughness
member.summary: Surface roughness (0.0 = smooth, 1.0 = rough). This modifies the MeshRendererComponent.material struct directly.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.visible
member.summary: Visibility toggle for this renderer.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.SetFloatProperty(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Set a float material property override. This creates a MaterialOverridesComponent and preserves GPU instancing. Use shader uniform names (e.g., "u_MetallicValue", "u_RoughnessValue").

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.SetVec3Property(System.String,BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector3)
member.summary: Set a Vector3 material property override. This creates a MaterialOverridesComponent and preserves GPU instancing. Use shader uniform names (e.g., "u_AlbedoColor", "u_EmissionColor").

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.SetVec4Property(System.String,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Set a Vector4 material property override. This creates a MaterialOverridesComponent and preserves GPU instancing. Use shader uniform names (e.g., "u_CustomColor").

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.HasPropertyOverride(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a material property override exists for the specified property.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.ClearPropertyOverride(System.String)
member.summary: Clear a specific material property override.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.MeshRenderer.ClearAllPropertyOverrides
member.summary: Clear all material property overrides.

member.name: T:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.EmissionType
member.summary: Shapes supported for particle emission.

member.name: T:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.BlendMode
member.summary: Blending modes for rendered particles.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.Play
member.summary: Starts the particle simulation.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.Stop
member.summary: Stops emission but keeps existing particles alive.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.Reset
member.summary: Stops and clears all particles.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.isPlaying
member.summary: Indicates whether the system is currently emitting.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.isAlive
member.summary: Indicates whether any particles are alive.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.activeCount
member.summary: Number of currently active particles.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.autoPlay
member.summary: Automatically starts playback when the component is enabled.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.blend
member.summary: Blending mode used when rendering particles.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.depthWrite
member.summary: Whether particles write to the depth buffer.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.renderLayer
member.summary: Render layer mask applied to particles.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.emissionType
member.summary: Shape from which particles are emitted.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.emitterSize
member.summary: Size of the emitter when using box emission.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.sphereRadius
member.summary: Radius when using spherical emission.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.emissionRate
member.summary: Number of particles emitted per second.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.maxParticles
member.summary: Maximum number of particles alive at once.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.looping
member.summary: Whether the system restarts automatically after finishing.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.duration
member.summary: Duration in seconds before the system stops emitting.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.minLifetime
member.summary: Minimum lifetime of spawned particles.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.maxLifetime
member.summary: Maximum lifetime of spawned particles.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.startColor
member.summary: Initial color of spawned particles.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.endColor
member.summary: Color particles transition to over their lifetime.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.startSize
member.summary: Initial particle size.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.endSize
member.summary: Final particle size at the end of its lifetime.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.startRotation
member.summary: Initial rotation of spawned particles in degrees.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.rotationSpeed
member.summary: Rotation speed applied over the particle's lifetime.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.startVelocity
member.summary: Initial velocity assigned to new particles.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.velocityRandomness
member.summary: Randomness applied to the starting velocity magnitude.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Particle.acceleration
member.summary: Constant acceleration applied to particles.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.ForceMode.Force
member.summary: Continuous force considering mass and timestep.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.ForceMode.Impulse
member.summary: Instant impulse applied at once.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.ForceMode.Acceleration
member.summary: Continuous acceleration ignoring mass.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.ForceMode.VelocityChange
member.summary: Instant velocity change ignoring mass.

member.name: T:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.MotionType
member.summary: Describes how the rigidbody is simulated.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.MotionType.Static
member.summary: Body does not move.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.MotionType.Dynamic
member.summary: Body is fully simulated by physics.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.MotionType.Kinematic
member.summary: Body is moved kinematically by user code.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.motionType
member.summary: Gets or sets the motion type.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.velocity
member.summary: Linear velocity of the rigidbody.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.Gravity
member.summary: Gravity multiplier applied to this body.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.IsKinematic
member.summary: Whether the body is kinematic.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.UseGravity
member.summary: Whether gravity affects the body.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.Mass
member.summary: Mass of the rigidbody.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.Drag
member.summary: Linear drag coefficient.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.AngularDrag
member.summary: Angular drag coefficient.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.Friction
member.summary: Surface friction coefficient.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.FreezeX
member.summary: Locks translation on the X axis.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.FreezeY
member.summary: Locks translation on the Y axis.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.FreezeZ
member.summary: Locks translation on the Z axis.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.FreezeRotX
member.summary: Locks rotation around the X axis.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.FreezeRotY
member.summary: Locks rotation around the Y axis.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.FreezeRotZ
member.summary: Locks rotation around the Z axis.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.LinearDamping
member.summary: Linear damping applied each update.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.AngularVelocity
member.summary: Angular velocity of the rigidbody.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.MovePosition(BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector3)
member.summary: Moves the rigidbody to a position using interpolation.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Rigidbody.AddForce(BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector3,BasilEngine.Components.ForceMode)
member.summary: Applies a force to the rigidbody.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Transform.position
member.summary: World position of the transform.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Transform.rotation
member.summary: Euler rotation of the transform in degrees.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Transform.scale
member.summary: Local scale of the transform.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Components.Transform.#ctor(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Creates a managed transform bound to an existing native object.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Transform.forward
member.summary: Forward direction of the transform in world space.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Transform.right
member.summary: Right direction of the transform in world space.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Components.Transform.up
member.summary: Up direction of the transform in world space.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Debug.Logger.Log(System.Object)
member.summary: Logs an informational message.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Debug.Logger.Warn(System.Object)
member.summary: Logs a warning message.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Debug.Logger.Error(System.Object)
member.summary: Logs an error message.

member.name: T:BasilEngine.GameObject
member.summary: Represents a game object in the Basil Engine.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.GameObject.transform
member.summary: Cached for this game object.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.GameObject.visibility
member.summary: Controls whether the object is rendered.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.GameObject.activeSelf
member.summary: Indicates whether the object is marked active in the engine.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.GameObject.activeInHierarchy
member.summary: Indicates whether the object is active considering its parent hierarchy.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.GameObject.isStatic
member.summary: Indicates whether the object is treated as static by the engine.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.GameObject.layer
member.summary: Rendering or collision layer assigned to this object.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.GameObject.#ctor(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Creates a managed wrapper for an existing native game object.
member.param: Native handle supplied by the engine.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.GameObject.Find(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a game object by name.
member.param: Name of the game object to locate.
member.returns: A managed wrapper or null if no match is found.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.GameObject.Destroy(BasilEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Destroys a game object instance.

member.name: T:BasilEngine.KeyCode
member.summary: The keycodes for the input class.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Input.GetKeyInternal(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check for key press or held.
member.returns: A bool to represent if the key is held down

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Input.GetKeyOnce(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check for key press.
member.returns: A bool to represent if the key is held down

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Input.GetKey(BasilEngine.KeyCode)
member.summary: Get key held down.
member.returns: If the key is held or not.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Input.GetKeyPress(BasilEngine.KeyCode)
member.summary: The key press.
member.param: The key to check if it is pressed.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Input.GetMouse(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether a mouse button is currently held.
member.returns: True if the button is down.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Input.GetMouseDown(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether a mouse button was pressed this frame.
member.returns: True if the button was pressed this frame.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Input.mousePosition
member.summary: Current mouse position in screen coordinates.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.PI
member.summary: The constant value of pi.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Deg2Rad
member.summary: Conversion multiplier from degrees to radians.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Rad2Deg
member.summary: Conversion multiplier from radians to degrees.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Epsilon
member.summary: Smallest positive non-zero value greater than zero.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Infinity
member.summary: Represents positive infinity.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.NegativeInfinity
member.summary: Represents negative infinity.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Abs(System.Single)
member.summary: Gets the absolute value of a float.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Sin(System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the sine of an angle in radians.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Cos(System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the cosine of an angle in radians.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.DeltaAngle(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the shortest delta between two angles in degrees.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Acos(System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the arccosine of a value.
member.returns: Angle in radians whose cosine is the input.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Asin(System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the arcsine of a value.
member.returns: Angle in radians whose sine is the input.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Atan(System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the arctangent of a value.
member.returns: Angle in radians whose tangent is the input.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Atan2(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the angle whose tangent is the quotient of two numbers.
member.returns: Angle in radians between the positive X-axis and the point.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Approximately(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines whether two floats are approximately equal.
member.returns: True if the values are within a small epsilon.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Ceil(System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the smallest integral value greater than or equal to the specified number.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.CeilToInt(System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the smallest integral value greater than or equal to the specified number as an int.
member.returns: Ceiling of the input as an int.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Clamp(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Clamps a float between a minimum and maximum value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Clamp(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Clamps an int between a minimum and maximum value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Clamp01(System.Single)
member.summary: Clamps a value between 0 and 1.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.ClosestPowerOfTwo(System.Int32)
member.summary: Finds the closest power of two that is greater than or equal to the specified value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.CorrelatedColorTemperatureToRGB(System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a correlated color temperature in Kelvin to an RGB color.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Exp(System.Single)
member.summary: Returns e raised to the specified power.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.FloatToHalf(System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a float into an unsigned 16-bit value representing the high 16 bits.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Floor(System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to the specified value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.FloorToInt(System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to the specified value as an int.
member.returns: Floor of the input as an int.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.GammaToLinearSpace(System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a value from gamma (sRGB) to linear space.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.HalfToFloat(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Converts the high 16 bits of an integer into a float.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.InverseLerp(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the linear parameter that produces the interpolant value within the range [a, b].

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.IsPowerOfTwo(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines if a value is a power of two.
member.returns: True if the value is a power of two.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Lerp(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Linearly interpolates between two values with clamping.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.LerpAngle(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Interpolates between two angles taking the shortest path.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.LerpUnclamped(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Linearly interpolates between two values without clamping the interpolation factor.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.LinearToGammaSpace(System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a value from linear space to gamma (sRGB) space.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Log(System.Single)
member.summary: Natural logarithm of a specified value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Log10(System.Single)
member.summary: Base-10 logarithm of a specified value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Max(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the larger of two floating-point numbers.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Min(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the smaller of two floating-point numbers.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.MoveTowards(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Moves a value towards a target by a maximum change.
member.returns: New value after applying the move.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.MoveTowardsAngle(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Moves an angle towards a target angle by a maximum change, accounting for wraparound.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.NextPowerOfTwo(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the smallest power of two that is greater than or equal to the specified value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.PingPong(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Ping-pongs a value between 0 and length.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Pow(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Raises a number to a specified power.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Repeat(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Repeats a value in the range [0, length).

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Round(System.Single)
member.summary: Rounds a value to the nearest integer.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.RoundToInt(System.Single)
member.summary: Rounds a value to the nearest integer and returns it as an int.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Sign(System.Single)
member.summary: Gets the sign of a value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.SmoothDamp(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single@,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Smoothly damps a value towards a target using a critically damped spring function.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.SmoothDampAngle(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single@,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Smoothly damps an angle towards a target angle using a critically damped spring function.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.SmoothStep(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Interpolates between two values using a smooth cubic curve.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Sqrt(System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the square root of a value.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Mathf.Tan(System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the tangent of the specified angle in radians.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2.x
member.summary: X component of the vector.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2.y
member.summary: Y component of the vector.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2.Distance(BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2,BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2)
member.summary: Get the distance between two vectors.
member.returns: The distane between the two vector.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2.ToString
member.summary: Convert the vector to a string.
member.returns: A string representaiton of the vector.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector2.magnitude
member.summary: The magnitude of the vector.

member.summary: Gradually changes a vector towards a desired goal.
member.param: Current velocity, modified by the function.
Approximate time to reach the target.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.NativeObject.NativeID
member.summary: Unique identifier assigned by the native engine for this object instance.

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Physics.Raycast(BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector3,BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector3,BasilEngine.RaycastHit@,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Casts a ray in the physics world.
member.param: Information about the hit if one occurred.
Maximum distance the ray should travel.
member.returns: True if the ray intersected a collider.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Ray.origin
member.summary: Starting point of the ray in world space.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.Ray.direction
member.summary: Direction vector of the ray (should be normalized).

member.name: M:BasilEngine.Ray.#ctor(BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector3,BasilEngine.Mathematics.Vector3)
member.summary: Initializes a new .

member.name: F:BasilEngine.RaycastHit.entity
member.summary: Game object hit by the ray.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.RaycastHit.point
member.summary: Point of intersection in world space.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.RaycastHit.normal
member.summary: Surface normal at the point of impact.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.RaycastHit.distance
member.summary: Distance from the ray origin to the hit point.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.RaycastHit.hasHit
member.summary: Non-zero if the ray registered a hit.

member.name: F:BasilEngine.RaycastHit.isTrigger
member.summary: Non-zero if the collider hit was a trigger.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.RaycastHit.Hit
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the ray intersected any collider.

member.name: P:BasilEngine.RaycastHit.Trigger
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the hit collider was a trigger.
